'''Mikki''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|boy]]. He had blue eyes and wore his blonde hair in pigtails. He, his two older brothers, and [[Mikki's father|their father]] were [[Scavenger/Legends|salvagers]] on [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]]. Mikki found [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane's]] [[Darth Bane's lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], and the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] the entire family with it, fueling himself on their pain to survive his [[Synox/Legends|synox]] [[Poison/Legends|poisoning]] by [[Githany]].<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith" />
